data.current_description: Upload an image via multipart form data, base64 encoded string, or URL. Maximum file size is 32 MB.
data.summary_suggestion: Upload and host an image with optional expiration
data.description_suggestion: Uploads an image to ImgBB for hosting via multipart form data, base64 encoded string, or URL. Supports optional expiration settings to automatically remove the image after a specified time period. Maximum file size is 32 MB. Returns an UploadResponse object containing the hosted image URL, deletion URL, and metadata. Requires API key authentication.
